metric_value: Intel Client Service Agreement: IT@Aberdeen Gold — $25,000 service fee + 5-unit Credit Bank ($5,000) = $30,000 total for 12 months (Sept 30, 2003 – Sept 29, 2004).

IT@Aberdeen Gold deliverables: 12-month term; 1 practice area (IT track); 1 hour/month phone ad-hoc inquiry; quarterly briefing; press quotes, press inquiries, VC inquiries, Snapshot, 1 Logo in IT Newsletter; access to publications library (incl. reports), survey research results, IT Access community content, IT research symposiums; credit bank applicable in 0.5-unit increments.
Peter Kastner, EVP designated as Intel's primary analyst. Research topic: Client Side Computing.

Intel Analyst Relations client contact 2003: Mike Green, 2111 NE 25th Ave, Hillsboro OR 97124; phone 503-264-1216; email mike.green@intel.com. Note: same JFCC address as the 2009 Intel NDA Analyst Summit (Study 10).
Sandra Tubbs, SVP — Aberdeen Sales Representative and contract signatory.
Contract terms: Advisory Services for 12-month periods auto-renew for additional 12-month terms unless 30-day prior written notice. Applicable law: Commonwealth of Massachusetts.

IT@Aberdeen Research offerings: primary research data (downloadable Excel), Market Research Reports, White Papers/Viewpoints/Profiles/Impacts, Insights/Perspectives/SnapShots/Solution Spotlights, Online Research Publication Library.

IT@Aberdeen Marketing Consulting/Advisory uses: competitive intelligence, market positioning, product gap analysis, M&A due diligence, marketing/positioning strategies, press/analyst beta-testing, sales collateral critique, business plan review, enterprise functional requirements determination.
Account Management: subscribers matched to analyst with best correlation of analyst and supplier focus; that analyst serves as primary point of contact for IT@Aberdeen Advisory issues.
Credit Bank: 1 unit = $1,000 value; may be applied to any Aberdeen research project, speaking fee, sponsorship, or webinar; applicable in 0.5-unit increments.
